description: When packing a small e-commerce order, the system must automatically select the cheapest parcel carrier for the required service level.

nodes.task_description: The system gets the package weight, dimensions, destination, and required service level ('Standard Ground').

expected_outcome.expected: The system gathers all necessary rating data.

nodes.task_description: The system sends rate requests to all integrated parcel carriers (e.g., UPS, FedEx, USPS).

expected_outcome.expected: The system receives rate responses from all carriers.

nodes.task_description: The system compares the rates and selects the cheapest option.

expected_outcome.expected: The system identifies USPS Ground Advantage as the lowest-cost option.

nodes.task_description: The system automatically generates the shipping label for the selected carrier.

expected_outcome.expected: A USPS shipping label is printed.
